steps.title: Read the slope of line u
Perpendicular slope = negative reciprocal
steps.content: Flip and negate: $-\frac{1}{2}$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice C, $-\frac{1}{2}$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
